CREATE TABLE test_table (num_value Float64, num_string String);
SELECT toDecimal32(num_value, 2) AS decimal_value FROM test_table;
SELECT toDecimal32(num_string, 3) AS decimal_value FROM test_table;
SELECT toDecimal32(num_value, 0) AS decimal_value_no_fraction FROM test_table;
SELECT toDecimal32(num_value, 9) AS decimal_value_high_scale FROM test_table;
SELECT toDecimal32('999999999', 0) AS large_integer_no_fraction;
SELECT toDecimal32('1234567890', 2) AS overflow_check;
SELECT toDecimal32(num_value, 5) + toDecimal32(num_string, 4) AS combined_decimal FROM test_table;
SELECT toDecimal32(toDecimal32(num_value, 1), 1) AS nested_conversion FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, toDecimal32(num_value, 4) AS decimal_val FROM (SELECT number AS id, rand() % 100 AS num_value FROM system.numbers LIMIT 10);
SELECT AVG(decimal_val) FROM temp_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table WHERE decimal_val > toDecimal32(10, 2);
SELECT a.id, toDecimal32(a.num_value, 1) FROM (SELECT id, num_value FROM test_table) AS a WHERE toDecimal32(a.num_value, 1) < 10;
SELECT DISTINCT toDecimal32(num_string, 2) FROM test_table WHERE toDecimal32(num_string, 2) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toDecimal32('1.23456789', 5) AS decimal_precision_check;
SELECT toDecimal32(NULL, 3) AS null_case;
SELECT toDecimal32('inf', 2) AS invalid_case_inf;
SELECT toDecimal32('NaN', 2) AS invalid_case_nan;
SELECT toDecimal32('0xc0fe', 1) AS invalid_case_hex;
SELECT toDecimal32(4.999999999999, 2) AS precision_loss;
SELECT toDecimal32('1.5', 1) AS valid_case;
